---
title: "Publicaciones"
listing:
  sort-ui: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  date-format: medium
  categories: true
  page-size: 500
  fields: [title, date, author, categories]
  filter-ui: [categories, date]
  field-links: 
    - categories
    - title
title-block-banner: "#212525"
title-block-banner-color: body
page-layout: custom
format: 
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1000px
      margin-width: 200px
---
